commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(skills): add full service overview and command reference to gog SKILL.md (fixes #94943)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The `gog` SKILL.md bundled in OpenClaw only documents 6 of 18+ supported Google services (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, Docs). Agents using the skill are unaware of YouTube, Maps, Forms, Meet, Classroom, Chat, Tasks, People, and other services that `gog` supports. This limits agent effectiveness when users request operations on those services.

## What Changed

- Updated `description` in frontmatter to list all supported services
- Added **Supported Services** section with a table of all 18+ services and their key commands
- Added **Additional capabilities** list (MCP server, Drive audits, Gmail filters, Workspace admin)
- Added **Full Command Reference** section pointing to `gog --help`, `gog <service> --help`, and https://gogcli.sh/
- Added `gog mcp` note to the Notes section
- Preserved all existing examples and formatting guidance unchanged

- [x] AI-assisted (Hermes Agent)

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** The `gog` SKILL.md now documents all services supported by gogcli, not just the original 6.
- **Environment tested:** Local OpenClaw build on macOS (Darwin 26.4.1), Node.js v24.x, upstream/main at 8f06e65f.
- **Steps run after the patch:** Ran `pnpm build` to confirm the skill file is included in the build output. Verified file content with `node -e` and `grep -n`.
- **Evidence after fix:**

```
$ pnpm build
...
✓ built in 519ms
[build-all] phase timings: total 79.4s

$ node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=fs.readFileSync('skills/gog/SKILL.md','utf8'); console.log('Has Supported Services:', c.includes('Supported Services')); console.log('Has YouTube:', c.includes('YouTube')); console.log('Has Maps:', c.includes('Maps')); console.log('Has MCP server:', c.includes('MCP server')); console.log('Has Full Command Reference:', c.includes('Full Command Reference')); console.log('Line count:', c.split('\n').length);"
Has Supported Services: true
Has YouTube: true
Has Maps: true
Has MCP server: true
Has Full Command Reference: true
Line count: 160

$ grep -n "Supported Services\|YouTube\|Maps\|MCP server\|Full Command Reference" skills/gog/SKILL.md
3:description: "...YouTube, and Workspace admin."
29:## Supported Services
45:| **YouTube** | channel data, search |
46:| **Maps/Places** | places search, details, directions, geocoding |
56:- **MCP server** — typed MCP server for agent clients
94:## Full Command Reference
```

- **Observed result after fix:** SKILL.md grew from 116 to 160 lines (+44 lines). All new service sections present. Build passes cleanly.
- **What was not tested:** Runtime behavior of `gog` CLI commands (requires Google OAuth setup). Content accuracy against gogcli source was verified by cross-referencing the gogcli README service list.
target.author: liuhao1024
